name: SUID or SGID Binaries Reconnaissance
notes: This rule detects a user trying to find all SUID/SGID binaries. Adversaries can use SUID/SGID binaries to escalate their privileges.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, System.Process Update Success

when the event matches lower("Command") matches '.*?find -perm -g=(s|u).*' or lower("Command Arguments") matches '.*?a0="find"\s(a\d="[^\"]+"\s)?a\d="-perm"\sa\d="[-\/]?([gu]=s|[42]\d{3})".*' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY SUID or SGID Binaries Reconnaissance on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, System.Process Update Success

AND when the event matches lower("Command") matches '.*?find -perm -g=(s|u).*' or lower("Command Arguments") matches '.*?a0="find"\s(a\d="[^\"]+"\s)?a\d="-perm"\sa\d="[-\/]?([gu]=s|[42]\d{3})".*' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: SUID or SGID Binaries Reconnaissance
Event description: Detects SUID or SGID binaries reconnaisance.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Container ID (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
